title: Dapr CloudEvent
description: A CloudEvents 1.0 specification envelope used by Dapr for pub/sub messaging. All published events are wrapped in this format unless raw payload mode is enabled.

specversion.description: The version of the CloudEvents specification.

source.description: The source of the event, typically the app ID of the publisher.

subject.description: The subject of the event in context of the event producer.

time.description: Timestamp of when the event occurred (RFC 3339).

datacontenttype.description: Content type of the data attribute (e.g., application/json).

topic.description: The topic the event was published to (Dapr extension).

pubsubname.description: The name of the pub/sub component (Dapr extension).

traceparent.description: The W3C trace context traceparent header value (Dapr extension).

tracestate.description: The W3C trace context tracestate header value (Dapr extension).
